dc.title: Map of the state of Michigan from the best authorities and most recent surveys compiled & drawn by S.N. Gaston.
dc.description: Includes "description of Michigan" listings position, history, climate, internal improvements, geology and mineralogy, and animals.
Includes a statistial table of Michigan.
1 map on six sheets ; 104 x 114 cm, sheets 52 x 38 cm
dc.subject: Michigan Maps.
dc.creator: Gaston, S.A.
